problem: Yeh powdery mildew (safed fungus) hai jo tamatar ki pattiyon par hota hai.
confirm: Pattiyon ke upar safed powder jaisa dikhega. Neeche se patti peeli padne lagegi.
treatment:
1. 1 litre chhaach (buttermilk) lein
2. 10 litre paani mein milayein
3. Pattiyon par achhe se spray karein
4. Har 3 din mein dohraye jab tak theek na ho
prevention: Paudhon ke beech 2 haath ki doori rakhein — hawa lagne se fungus nahi aata.
timing: Subah 6-8 baje, dhoop nikalne se pehle spray karein.

problem: Gehu ki pattiyon ka peela padna nitrogen ki kami darshata hai.
confirm: Purani (neeche wali) pattiyan pehle peeli hoti hain. Nayi pattiyan halki hari rehti hain.
treatment:
1. 200 litre jeevamruta banayein
2. 1 acre mein paani ke saath de
3. 15 din mein dobara dein
4. Geeli patti par neem ka ark bhi spray karein
prevention: Har 15 din mein jeevamruta dete rahein — mitti mein nitrogen banta rahega.
timing: Sham 4-6 baje, jab dhoop halki ho.

problem: Yeh fungal blight hai — kale dhabbe pattiyon par dikhte hain aur fasal ko kharab karte hain.
confirm: Pattiyon par gol kale ya bhure dhabbe dikhenge. Geeli hawa mein tezi se failte hain.
treatment:
1. 1 kilo trichoderma powder lein
2. 100 litre paani mein ghol lein
3. Pattiyon par aur mitti mein spray karein
4. Har hafte dohraye baarish ke mausam mein
prevention: Fasal chakra apnayein — ek hi jagah baar baar aalu mat lagayein.
timing: Subah 6-8 baje, baarish na ho tab spray karein.

problem: Yeh fruit borer (sundi) hai jo tamatar ke andar ghus kar kharab karta hai.
confirm: Tamatar mein chhota ched dikhega. Andar sundi ya uski latth hogi.
treatment:
1. 5 litre paani mein 1 cup neem ke beej ka powder milayein
2. Achhe se ghol lein aur chhan lein
3. Phoolon aur phalo par spray karein
4. Har 5 din mein dohraye
prevention: Tamatar ke saath genda (marigold) lagayein — keede gende ki taraf jayenge.
timing: Sham ko 5 baje ke baad spray karein.

problem: Yeh fusarium wilt hai — paudha achanak murjha jata hai jaise paani nahi mila.
confirm: Paudha din mein murjhata hai, raat mein thoda theek lagta hai. Tana kaatein to andar bhura dikhega.
treatment:
1. 1 kilo trichoderma 50 litre paani mein milayein
2. Paudhe ki jad ke paas mitti mein dalein
3. Saath mein jeevamruta bhi dein
4. 10 din baad phir se karein
prevention: Beej bonne se pehle beejamruta se beej upchar zaroor karein.
timing: Sham ko 4-5 baje, mitti geeli honi chahiye.

problem: Cheetiyan fasal ke paas aati hain kyunki kuch keede meetha ras chhodte hain.
confirm: Paudhon ke tane par ya mitti mein bahut cheetiyan dikhengi. Pattiyon par chipchipa ras bhi ho sakta hai.
treatment:
1. Haldi powder paudhon ke aas paas chhidkein
2. Neem ka tel 5ml per litre paani mein mila kar spray karein
3. Paudhe ki jad par rakh (ash) daalein
prevention: Khet ke kinare par pudina ya tulsi lagayein — cheetiyan door rehti hain.
timing: Subah jaldi ya sham ko lagayein.

problem: Yeh mahu (aphids) hain — chhote hare ya kale keede jo ras chooste hain.
confirm: Pattiyon ke peechhe chhote-chhote keede dikhenge. Pattiyan mud jayengi ya chipchipa lagegi.
treatment:
1. 1 cup neem ke patte peesein
2. 5 litre paani mein raat bhar bhigoyein
3. Subah chhan kar spray karein
4. 3 din mein dohraye
prevention: Paudhon ke beech dhaniya ya sarson lagayein — mahu ke dushman keede aate hain.
timing: Subah 7 baje spray karein jab keede sust hote hain.

problem: Yeh jad sadna (root rot) hai — zyada paani ya fungus ke kaaran jad gal jaati hai.
confirm: Paudha murjha raha hai par mitti geeli hai. Jad nikalein to bhuri-kaali aur gili hogi.
treatment:
1. Paani dena band karein 3-4 din
2. Trichoderma 1 kilo per 50 litre paani mein ghol kar jad mein dalein
3. Mitti mein rakh milayein drainage ke liye
prevention: Kyari oonchi banayein taaki paani na ruke. Hamesha achhi drainage rakhein.
timing: Dhoop wale din subah karein — mitti sukhe.

problem: Mirchi ka patta mudna virus ya safed makhi ke kaaran hota hai.
confirm: Naye patte upar ki taraf mud jayenge. Pattiyon par halke peele dhabbe bhi ho sakte hain.
treatment:
1. Neem tel 5ml + 1 litre paani mein milayein
2. Thoda sa sabun ka ghol milayein (chipkane ke liye)
3. Pattiyon ke upar aur neeche dono taraf spray karein
4. Har 4 din mein dohraye
prevention: Safed makhi ke liye peele chipchipe trap (gond wale peele kagaz) lagayein.
timing: Subah 6-7 baje jab safed makhi sust hoti hai.

problem: Tana chhedak (stem borer) ganne ke andar ghus kar khata hai.
confirm: Ganne ki naye patti ka giruha sukh jayega (dead heart). Tane mein ched dikhega.
treatment:
1. Trichogramma ke card khet mein lagayein (8 card per acre)
2. Prabhavit ganne ko kaat kar jala dein
3. Neem ki khali jad mein dalein
prevention: Ganne ke saath dhaniya ya methi ki intercropping karein.
timing: Trichogramma card subah 7-8 baje lagayein.

problem: Phoolon ka girna garmi, paani ki kami ya poshak tattvon ki kami se hota hai.
confirm: Phool aa rahe hain par girte ja rahe hain. Phal nahi ban raha.
treatment:
1. Panchagavya 3% (30ml per litre paani) spray karein
2. Jeevamruta jad mein dein
3. Subah-sham halka paani dein
4. Mulching karein jad ke paas
prevention: Niyamit roop se panchagavya spray karte rahein phool aane ke samay.
timing: Subah 6-7 baje spray karein, dhoop mein nahi.

problem: Safed makhi chhota uda hua keeda hai jo patti ka ras choosta hai aur virus failata hai.
confirm: Patti hilane par chhoti safed makhiyan udti dikhengi. Pattiyon par chipchipa ras hoga.
treatment:
1. Peele chipchipe trap lagayein (har 10 kadam par)
2. Neem tel 5ml per litre paani + thoda sabun ghol spray karein
3. Har 3 din mein spray dohraye
prevention: Khet ke charon taraf genda ya tulsi lagayein.
timing: Subah 6-7 baje spray karein.

problem: Lal makdi keeda (red spider mite) patti ka ras choosta hai — pattiyan sukh jaati hain.
confirm: Pattiyon ke neeche bahut chhote lal bindu dikhenge. Jala jaisa dhaaga bhi dikh sakta hai.
treatment:
1. 1 kilo green mirchi peesein
2. 10 litre paani mein milayein
3. Chhan kar pattiyon ke neeche spray karein
4. 4 din mein dohraye
prevention: Paani ka spray pattiyon par regular karein — makdi keeda geeli jagah nahi aata.
timing: Sham 5 baje ke baad spray karein.

problem: Paudhe ki dheemi vriddhi mitti mein jeevaanu ya poshak tattvon ki kami se hoti hai.
confirm: Paudha umra ke hisaab se chhota hai. Pattiyan halki hari ya peeli hain. Jad kamzor hai.
treatment:
1. Jeevamruta 200 litre per acre har 15 din
2. Ghana jeevamruta (solid) jad ke paas rakhein
3. Panchagavya spray 3% har hafte
4. Mulching karein organic padaarth se
prevention: Mitti mein jeevamruta dena kabhi band na karein — yahi sabse zaroori hai.
timing: Sham ko 4-5 baje mitti geeli karke dein.

problem: Yeh aalu ka jhulsa rog hai — baarish ke mausam mein tezi se failta hai.
confirm: Pattiyon ke kinare se bhure-kale dhabbe shuru hote hain. Geeli hawa mein safed fungus bhi dikhe.
treatment:
1. Trichoderma 1 kilo + 50 litre paani spray karein
2. Chhaach (buttermilk) 1 litre + 10 litre paani spray
3. Prabhavit pattiyan tod kar jala dein
4. Har 5 din mein dohraye
prevention: Beejamruta se beej upchaar karein. Paudhon mein hawa ka raasta rakhein.
timing: Baarish ruke turant spray karein, subah jaldi.

problem: Dheemak (termite) jad aur tana kha jaata hai — paudha achanak sukh jaata hai.
confirm: Paudha sukh gaya hai par rog nahi dikha. Jad ya tane ke paas mitti ka rasta dikhega.
treatment:
1. Neem ki khali 2 kilo per 100 sq ft mitti mein milayein
2. Beauveria bassiana powder mitti mein milayein
3. Khet mein neeli roshni ka trap lagayein raat ko
prevention: Kacche gobar ki jagah sadi hui gobar khad hi dalein — kacha gobar dheemak bulate hai.
timing: Buwai se pehle mitti mein milayein.

problem: Yeh rice blast fungus hai — dhaan ki baal toot jaati hai ya dhabbe aate hain.
confirm: Pattiyon par heere jaisa (diamond shape) dhabba. Baal ke neeche kala nishan — baal toot jaaye.
treatment:
1. Pseudomonas fluorescens 1 kilo per 100 litre spray
2. Neem tel 5ml per litre paani spray
3. Potassium ke liye rakh (wood ash) kheton mein dalein
prevention: Beejamruta se beej upchar. Zyada khad na dalein — nitrogen zyada hone se blast hota hai.
timing: Subah jaldi jab os sukhne lage tab spray karein.

problem: Bhure dhabbe pattiyon par fungal infection ka sanket hain.
confirm: Gol bhure dhabbe pattiyon par dikhenge jinke aas paas peela gola hoga.
treatment:
1. Chhaach 1 litre + paani 10 litre spray
2. Trichoderma 500gm per 50 litre paani spray
3. Prabhavit pattiyan tod kar hatayein
prevention: Fasal chakra apnayein. Mitti ki sehat jeevamruta se banaye rakhein.
timing: Subah 7-8 baje dhoop nikalne se pehle.

problem: Yeh mosaic virus hai — pattiyon par hari-peeli dhaariyaan aati hain.
confirm: Patti par hari-peeli rangon ka irregular pattern. Paudha chhota reh jaata hai.
treatment:
1. Prabhavit paudhe turant ukhad kar jala dein (virus failta hai)
2. Baaki paudhon par neem tel spray karein (virus failane wale keedon ko rokne ke liye)
3. Khet mein saaf-safai rakhein
prevention: Rogi paudhe ko haath lagakar swasth paudhe ko mat chhuyein. Beejamruta se beej upchar karein.
timing: Rogi paudha dikhte hi turant hatayein — deri na karein.

problem: Phal ka sadna (fruit rot) fungus ya bacteria ke kaaran hota hai — zyada neemi se badhta hai.
confirm: Phal par bhura ya kaala geela dhabba jo badhta jaaye. Phal mulayam ho jayega.
treatment:
1. Sade phal turant tod kar door phenkein (khet se bahar)
2. Trichoderma spray 500gm per 50 litre paani
3. Paudhon ke neeche mulching hatayein taaki hawa lage
prevention: Phal ko zameen se chhoone na dein — lakdi ki support lagayein.
timing: Baarish ke baad turant spray karein.

problem: Pattiyan khane wali sundi (caterpillar) fasal ko barbaad kar sakti hai.
confirm: Pattiyon mein bade-bade ched. Sundi patti ke peechhe chhipi hogi — haath se bhi dikh sakti hai.
treatment:
1. Neem beej powder 500gm + 10 litre paani ka ghol spray karein
2. Haath se sundi chun kar sabun ke paani mein daalein
3. Chidiya aane dein khet mein (perch lagayein)
4. Har 4 din mein spray dohraye
prevention: Khet mein T-shape lakdi ki perch lagayein — chidiyaan aake sundi khayengi.
timing: Sham ko 5 baje ke baad spray karein.

problem: Uktha rog (wilt) mein paudha achanak sukh jaata hai — fungus jad par hamla karta hai.
confirm: Paudha ek taraf se sukhega. Tana kaatein to andar bhoora ring dikhega.
treatment:
1. Trichoderma 1 kilo + 50 litre paani jad mein dalein
2. Neem ki khali mitti mein milayein
3. Prabhavit paudhe ukhad kar jala dein
prevention: 3 saal mein ek baar hi chana lagayein ek jagah. Beejamruta se beej zaroor upcharein.
timing: Buwai ke samay trichoderma mitti mein milayein.

problem: Gandhi bug dhaan ke dane ka ras choosta hai — dane khaali reh jaate hain.
confirm: Khet mein gandi badbu aayegi. Dane dabaane par khaali ya aadhe bhare milenge.
treatment:
1. Neem tel 5ml per litre paani spray karein baal aane par
2. Khet mein raat ko roshni ka trap lagayein
3. Khet ke aas paas ki ghas saaf rakhein
prevention: Khet ke kinare ki ghas samay par kaatein — gandhi bug wahi chhipte hain.
timing: Sham ko dhaan ki baal par spray karein.

problem: Thrips bahut chhote keede hain jo pyaaz ki patti ka ras choose lete hain.
confirm: Pattiyon par chandi jaisi dhaariyan dikhengi. Patti sikud jayegi.
treatment:
1. Green mirchi + lehsun ka paste 100gm
2. 5 litre paani mein raat bhar bhigoyein
3. Chhan kar spray karein pattiyon par
4. Har 4 din mein dohraye
prevention: Pyaaz ke saath dhaniya ya gajar lagayein — thrips kam aate hain.
timing: Subah 7 baje se pehle spray karein.

problem: Gobhi ka khokhla hona boron ki kami se hota hai.
confirm: Gobhi ka tana andar se khokhla hoga. Phool bhoora ya dhabbedar ho sakta hai.
treatment:
1. Borax powder 1 chamach per 10 litre paani mein ghol kar spray karein
2. Jeevamruta niyamit roop se dein
3. Ghana jeevamruta jad ke paas rakhein
prevention: Mitti mein organic matter banaye rakhein — jeevamruta boron ki kami door karta hai.
timing: Phool banne se pehle spray karein.

problem: Chhote paudhe nursery mein gir kar mar jaate hain — yeh damping off hai.
confirm: Tana zameen ke paas patla ho jayega aur paudha gir jayega. Mitti zyada geeli hogi.
treatment:
1. Paani kam karein — mitti sukhne dein
2. Trichoderma 500gm + 50 litre paani se mitti drench karein
3. Rakh (wood ash) mitti ki satah par chhidkein
prevention: Nursery ki mitti pehle dhoop mein 2 din sukhayein. Beejamruta se beej upchar karein.
timing: Buwai se pehle mitti ka upchar karein.

problem: Geruya (rust) ek fungal rog hai — pattiyon par narangi-bhure dane dikhte hain.
confirm: Pattiyon par chhoti narangi-lal daane jaisi dhaariyaan dikhengi. Haath lagane par rang lage.
treatment:
1. Chhaach (buttermilk) 1 litre + 10 litre paani spray karein
2. Neem tel 5ml per litre paani bhi mila sakte hain
3. Har 5 din mein dohraye
prevention: Rog-mukt beej hi boya karein. Samay par buwai karein — deri se rust zyada hota hai.
timing: Subah 7-8 baje dhoop se pehle spray karein.

problem: Pyaaz ka sadna storage mein ya khet mein fungus ke kaaran hota hai.
confirm: Pyaaz se badbu aayegi. Dabane par mulayam lagega. Kaatne par andar bhoora ya gila dikhega.
treatment:
1. Sade pyaaz alag kar lein — baakiyon se door
2. Storage mein hawa ka raasta rakhein
3. Trichoderma se upchar karein storage se pehle
prevention: Pyaaz ko dhoop mein 3-4 din sukhayein storage se pehle. Geeli pyaaz na rakhein.
timing: Storage se pehle 3-4 din dhoop mein sukhayein.

problem: Tikka rog moongfali ki pattiyon par gol dhabbe dalta hai — fungus se hota hai.
confirm: Pattiyon par chhote gol bhure dhabbe jinke aas paas peela gola. Bahut dhabbe honge to patti gir jaayegi.
treatment:
1. Neem tel 5ml + 1 litre paani spray karein
2. Trichoderma 500gm + 50 litre paani spray
3. Prabhavit pattiyan tod dein
4. Har hafte spray dohraye
prevention: Fasal chakra apnayein aur beejamruta se beej upchar karein.
timing: Subah 7-8 baje, dhoop se pehle.
